backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining all data types (Employee, Shift, Timesheet, etc.) and in-memory Maps for the HR management application, with authorization mixin and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial migration module that passes state through unchanged, serving as a no-op migration placeholder.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: fixing the frontend startup crash and resolving TypeScript compilation errors across timesheet and scheduling pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short descriptions summarizing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that sets up TanStack Router with lazy-loaded page components, role-based route guards, a QueryClient provider, AuthProvider, and an ErrorBoundary wrapper.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based ErrorBoundary component that catches render errors and displays a styled fallback UI with error details and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Reusable badge component that maps status/role string values to styled pill labels with predefined color configurations.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Defines an AuthContext providing session state (stored in sessionStorage), role-based boolean flags, and login/logout helpers, along with a useAuth hook and AuthProvider component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Re-exports useAuth, useAuthContext, and getStoredSession from AuthContext as a convenience hook module.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a comprehensive set of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend entities including employees, shifts, job postings, timesheets, PTO, and more via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind with a navy/amber corporate OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, and defines status badge utility classes.
frontend/src/layouts/EmployeeLayout.tsx: Employee-facing layout component featuring a sliding drawer sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Schedule, Timesheet, Time Off), user info display, and a logout button.
frontend/src/layouts/HRAdminLayout.tsx: Defines the HR Admin layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for HR-specific routes (employees, hiring, scheduling, etc.) and a logout button.
frontend/src/layouts/ManagerLayout.tsx: Defines the Manager layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for manager-specific routes (team, scheduling, timesheets, etc.) and a logout button.
frontend/src/layouts/SupervisorLayout.ts: Defines the Supervisor layout with a top header and sliding drawer sidebar for supervisor routes (dashboard, schedules, time-off) and a logout action.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides shared utility functions including Tailwind class merging, date/time formatting, nanosecond timestamp conversions, and a safe string helper.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeDash: Employee dashboard displaying quick stats (upcoming shifts, pending time-off, total shifts) and a list of upcoming published shifts fetched for the logged-in employee.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeSche: Displays an employee's published shifts in a weekly calendar view with navigation controls to move between weeks. Fetches shifts via a query hook and filters to only show published status shifts.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeTime: Allows employees to submit time off requests and view their pending, approved, and denied requests. Includes a form with type, date range, and notes fields, with validation and toast notifications.

Provides a weekly timesheet entry form where employees can input start/end times for each day and submit the timesheet. Displays existing timesheet status and calculates total hours for the selected week.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AccountManagementP: HR admin page for creating new user login accounts with role assignment (HR Admin, Manager, Supervisor, Employee). Includes a modal form with validation, password confirmation, and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AddEmployeePage.ts: HR page for creating a new employee record along with a linked login account. Includes a form with personal info, role, department, manager assignment, and credentials with validation.
frontend/src/pages/hr/ApplicantPipelineP: Displays a Kanban-style pipeline of applicants for a specific job posting, grouped by stage. Allows adding new applicants and moving them between stages via modal and dropdown controls.
frontend/src/pages/hr/CreateJobPostingPa: Form page for creating a new job posting with fields for title, department, description, and status. Validates inputs and submits via the createJobPosting mutation, then redirects to the hiring page.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeeDetailPage: Shows detailed information for a single employee with inline editing, deactivation, and deletion capabilities. HR admins can update fields like role, department, manager, and badge ID.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeesPage.tsx: Lists all employees with search and filter controls for department and status. Supports navigating to individual employee details and deleting employees with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HiringPage.tsx: Hiring and recruitment page that displays job postings grouped by status (open, draft, closed) in a kanban-style column layout with applicant counts and navigation to individual posting pipelines.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRDashboard.tsx: HR overview dashboard displaying KPI cards for active employees, open job postings, pending time-off requests, and department count. Each card links to the relevant HR sub-page.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRTimesheetPage.ts: HR timesheet management page that lists all timesheets with filtering/search, allows HR to approve or deny manager-approved timesheets, and shows a deny dialog requiring a comment.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOBalancesPage.ts: Page for HR to view and adjust PTO balances for all employees, displaying each employee's current balance and policy with a modal dialog for making adjustments.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOPoliciesPage.ts: Page listing all PTO policies in a card grid with accrual rate, max carry-over, and eligible leave types, with buttons to create new policies or navigate to balance management.
Form page for creating or editing a PTO policy, handling fields for name, accrual rate, max carry-over, and a dynamic list of eligible leave types with validation.
frontend/src/pages/hr/SchedulingPage.tsx: HR scheduling page that displays a weekly calendar view of shifts by department, allowing HR users to add, delete, publish, and unpublish shifts via modals and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/hr/TimeOffRequestsPag: HR page for reviewing employee time-off requests, displaying pending and processed requests in tables with approve/deny actions and a denial reason modal.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting username/password authentication and badge scanning (via camera barcode detection or manual input), routing users to their role-specific dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerAccoun: Manager page for creating new Employee or Manager login accounts via a form modal with validation, password visibility toggles, and server error handling.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerDashbo: Manager dashboard showing KPI cards for active team members, scheduling, and pending time-off approvals, with navigation links to relevant sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerSchedu: Manager-facing weekly shift scheduling page scoped to the manager's department, supporting shift creation, deletion, and publish/unpublish actions with draft/published status tracking.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTeamPa: Displays a searchable table of all employees with their name, department, job title, start date, and status. Fetches employee data via a custom hook and shows loading skeletons while data is loading.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimeOf: Manager page for reviewing time-off requests, split into pending and processed sections with approve/deny actions. Deny action opens a modal requiring a comment before submission.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimesh: Manager page for reviewing submitted employee timesheets, allowing approval or denial with a required comment. Displays pending and previously reviewed timesheets in separate sections with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/supervisor/Supervisor: Supervisor dashboard showing KPI cards for total employees, pending time-off requests, and total requests, with quick-action navigation buttons. Fetches employee and time-off data directly via useQuery with the actor.

Supervisor page for viewing department shift schedules in a weekly calendar grid, with department selection and week navigation controls. Fetches shifts by department and maps them to the correct day columns.
Supervisor page for reviewing employee time-off requests, allowing approval or denial (with required comment) via mutations, and displaying pending and processed requests with status badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, amber, sidebar, chart), CSS variable-based theming with oklch colors, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the 'Aerotek (IU) Employee Management' HR platform, including architectural notes, existing features, known login/auth issues, and role definitions for HR Admin, Manager, Supervisor, and Employee.
